titleStmt.title: SII 25.192: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 192. (A.R. No. 192 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
The record may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to c. 13th century A.D.

It refers to an order (ōlai) recording the gift of land for the food offerings to the deity of the temple of Uḍaiyār Tiruuśāttānam-uḍaiyār in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu. The order was issued to the tānattār of the temple by a certain Kāliṅgarāyan. The lands donated as iṟaiyili are from Uppūr alias Vikramaśōḻapaṭṭaṇam, Uśāttānam alias Kēraḷakulāsanichaturvēdimaṅgalam, etc.
It also mentions Śāttānam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and Kalyāṇapuraṅgoṇḍaśōḻapuram among the boundaries.
The signatories mentioned are Kāliṅgarāyan and Muṉaiyadarayan.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ḷa Olaikku paṭi . kāliṅkarāyaṉ O
lai . puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu Uṭaiyā
r tiruucāttāṉamuṭaiyār koyi
l tāṉattār kaṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṉāṟkku
tiruvamutupaṭik kuṭalāka Eṉ kāṇiyāṉa
Ūrkaḷil Uppūrāṉ vikkirama coḻaṉ pa
ṭṭaṇattu piṟinta coḻativākara nallūruṭaṉ
kūṭṭiṉa nilamāy Ucāttāṉa māṉa keraḷaku
lācaṉi caruppetimaṅkalattu vaṉṉiyāril co
ḻiyavaraiyaṉ Akampaṭiyārkku kāval kūlikku
Iṭṭa nilamāy Ivaṉai tavirntu Iṉṉāyaṉārkku
ṉiyam Iṟaiyiliyum Āka
kuṭutta kaliyāṇapuraṅkoṇṭa coḻapurat
tukku pokiṟa peruvaḻikku teṟkku nilam Ira
ṇṭu māvum nālām vāykkāl kiḻkaṇṭat
tu nilam Araimāmuntirikaiyum Āka nilam
Irumā Araiye muntirikai Innilam Irumā
varaiye muntirikaiyum Irupattoṉṟā
vatu mutal Innāyaṉārkku tiruvamutupaṭikkuṭa
lāka tirukkaimmalarile nirvārttuk kuṭut
tom Innilattāl vanta tarappaṭi maṭakku
Eṉ kāṇippaṟṟoṭe kūṭṭik kaṭamai kuṭi
mai niṉaippiṭṭut taṇṭum vaṟkaṅka
ḷum Eṟaṭṭukkoṇṭu cantirātittavaraiyum
Iṟukkak kaṭaveṉāṉamaikku Ivai kāliṅka
rāya neḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai
yātavarāyaneḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭi
Iṭṭa Olaippaṭikku Etiraṭai §
Digital edition of SII 25.192 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
